subcodes.first_line: O thou whose service is accepted and whose efforts are praiseworthy! Thou hast kept watch over the sacred treasury, which is the niche of the Temple's Lamp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدمت تو مقبول و ای زحمت تو مشکور نظارت صندوق مقدس نمودی که مشکوه سراج هیکل
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
